mapper.select: SELECT rv.review_id AS reviewId, rv.member_id AS memberId, m.nickname AS nickname, rv.rating AS rating, rv.content AS content, rv.created_at AS createdAt FROM review rv JOIN member m ON m.member_id = rv.member_id WHERE rv.recipe_id = #{recipeId} ORDER BY rv.created_at DESC, rv.review_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId}
SELECT rating AS rating, COUNT(*) AS count FROM review WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} GROUP BY rating

SELECT rv.review_id AS reviewId, rv.member_id AS memberId, m.nickname AS nickname, rv.rating AS rating, rv.content AS content, COALESCE(rv.member_id = #{viewerId}, 0) AS isOwner, rv.created_at AS createdAt FROM review rv JOIN member m ON m.member_id = rv.member_id WHERE rv.review_id = #{reviewId} LIMIT 1
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM recipe WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (member_id, recipe_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{cmd.memberId}, #{cmd.recipeId}, #{cmd.rating}, #{cmd.content})
